title: °Ubaydallah b. Ziyad and the People of al-Bagrah Following the Death of Yazid
description: °Ubaydallah b. Ziyad and the People of al-Bagrah Following the Death of Yazid. Recorded under the year 64 AH (684–685 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 20.
